title: MARA Announces Fourth Quarter and Full Year 2024 Results
text: MARA (NASDAQ: MARA) announced fourth quarter and full year 2024 results. The company reported record-high Revenue, Net Income, and Adjusted EBITDA for both the full year and Q4 2024. Additional achievements included a direct energy cost of $28.8K per bitcoin from owned facilities and a Bitcoin yield per share of 62.9% for the year. The company held a webcast and conference call on February 26, 2025 at 5:00 p.m. Eastern Time to discuss financial results. Supporting documents included the shareholder letter, 10-K filing, and earnings presentation, all accessible through the investor relations website.
